approved_companies.name: ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
approved_companies.rationale: ON Semiconductor is a significant player in the semiconductor sector, providing a broad range of products used in diverse applications from automotive to industrial sectors.

approved_companies.name: INTEL CORP
approved_companies.rationale: Intel is one of the largest and most influential companies in the semiconductor industry worldwide, focusing on microprocessors and other semiconductor products.

approved_companies.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
approved_companies.rationale: Advanced Micro Devices is a major competitor in the semiconductor market, known for its high-performance computing and graphics technology.

approved_companies.name: NVIDIA CORP
approved_companies.rationale: NVIDIA specializes in graphics processing units (GPUs) and is a key player in the domains of AI, gaming, and autonomous vehicles among semiconductors.

approved_companies.name: Broadcom Inc.
approved_companies.rationale: Broadcom Inc. is a major designer, developer, and global supplier of a broad range of semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions.
